briefing: Risk-on day with NASDAQ up 2.1% and S&P up 1.2% — growth and momentum names are leading. I'm deploying the remaining cash into CMCSA and SOFI, both scoring 95 with clean technical setups (MACD crossovers, bullish RSI, price above SMA-20). Existing positions in EAT, OLED, WT, ROAD, and INOD are all held — no stop-loss triggers and no reason to exit in a broad up-tape. Portfolio P&L remains strong at +32.6%.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge happens when a stock trades significantly more shares than its recent daily average — often 1.5x or more. It signals that large investors (institutions, funds) are actively buying or selling, giving more weight to any price move. A price breakout with a volume surge is considered far more reliable than one on thin volume, because it shows conviction behind the move.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某隻股票的單日成交量遠超近期日均水平（通常達1.5倍以上）。這往往代表大型機構投資者正在積極買入或賣出，令價格走勢更具說服力。若股價突破關鍵位置時伴隨成交量激增，通常被視為更可靠的信號，因為背後有資金支撐，而非虛假突破。

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged today in a broad risk-on rally, with the NASDAQ gaining 2.1% led by technology and growth sectors. Improving investor sentiment around trade policy and continued AI-driven capital expenditure expectations pushed mega-cap tech higher, pulling the broader S&P 500 up 1.2%. Volume surges in select names like CMCSA and SOFI suggest institutional rotation into momentum plays as confidence in the macro backdrop strengthens.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面走強，呈現風險偏好格局，納斯達克指數上漲2.1%，科技及成長類股領漲。市場對貿易政策前景趨於樂觀，加上人工智能資本支出預期持續升溫，推動大型科技股走高，帶動標普500指數上揚1.2%。CMCSA、SOFI等個股成交量大幅放大，反映機構資金積極佈局動能股，顯示投資者對總體經濟環境信心增強。

trades.reasoning: Top-tier score 95 with the full signal stack: RSI in bullish momentum zone, MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge confirming institutional interest — best risk/reward among today's candidates.

Score 95 with MACD histogram rising alongside crossover signals, RSI 65.9 in the sweet spot with room before overbought, and price comfortably above SMA-20 in a risk-on tape that favors fintech growth names.
